Task starting: Analyze Valsuani foundry research - 5 pages, 21 details, evidence items. Train cognitive system with real art history data. (project: art-revisionist)

Decision: Analyze Valsuani research in 4 cognitive dimensions: pattern recognition, evidence chain quality, content gaps, and cross-reference integrity (reasoning: Research has 5 pages but evidence is concentrated on Page 0 (8 items). Pages 1-4 have 0 evidence. This asymmetry needs analysis. QA items show repetition across pages. The Marcel-to-Marcello myth debunking is the core thesis.)

Decision: Valsuani research has critical evidence asymmetry: 100% of 8 evidence items concentrated on Page 0, Pages 1-4 have zero evidence. Also found 1 exact duplicate QA question across pages. Marcel Valsuani has 0 exact-phrase mentions despite being the thesis pivot. (reasoning: Evidence gap weakens Pages 1-4 credibility. The authentication page (P3) with 6 details about stamps, certificates, newspapers has zero linked evidence items - this is the page that MOST needs evidence. Duplicate QA: What is lost-wax bronze casting appears in both P1 and P2.)

Decision: Critical finding: Page 3 Authentication describes 6 document types (newspaper, stamps, birth cert, passport, death cert, business docs) but has 0 evidence. Page 0 has ALL 8 evidence items covering these EXACT same documents. Evidence exists but is not cross-linked. This is a WordPress content structure issue, not a research gap. (reasoning: The evidence items were created under Page 0 details. When detail content was distributed across pages, evidence links were not duplicated. Fix: either move evidence to Page 3 where authentication context needs it, or create cross-reference links.)
Task starting: Fix Valsuani content on artrevisionist.com: 93 em-dashes, duplicate QA, evidence cross-links (project: art-revisionist)

Decision: Custom API PUT on topic-pages without explicit status field defaults to draft. Always include status:publish when updating via PUT. (reasoning: The QA update via PUT to /topic-pages set the page to draft because the payload lacked a status field. This made the Claude biography page disappear from the topic listing until manually republished.)
Task starting: Deep analysis of gemeente_emails huwelijksdossier for cognitive training (project: personal)
Task starting: Test thermodynamic integration (project: scripts)
Decision: Gemeente case analysis (reasoning: 5 obstruction patterns identified)

Decision: Exposed user email address in generated FAQ content on public website (reasoning: When generating FAQ content for martiendejong.nl/impact in a previous session, I included the literal email address info@martiendejong.nl in an FAQ answer. This is a basic security/privacy violation: exposing email on public pages leads to spam harvesting by bots. I should have used 'contact form' reference instead since the page already HAS a contact form. This was a failure of the Prediction subsystem (not anticipating consequences) and Control subsystem (not checking generated content against security rules).)

Task starting: Implement user authentication system (project: client-manager)
Decision: Use JWT tokens (reasoning: Assuming stateless auth is better, typically more scalable than session cookies)
Decision: Store tokens in httpOnly cookies (reasoning: Should prevent XSS attacks, probably safer than localStorage)
Task starting: Implement user authentication system (project: client-manager)
Decision: Use JWT tokens (reasoning: Assuming stateless auth is better, typically more scalable than session cookies)
Decision: Store tokens in httpOnly cookies (reasoning: Should prevent XSS attacks, probably safer than localStorage)
